case_title: CHAMPSEE SOLUTIONS LLC VS. JOE'S CLOCK SHOP LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,825.00 FILED BY CHAMPSEE SOLUTIONS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JOE'S CLOCK SHOP LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF CHAMPSEE SOLUTIONS LLC. RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAMPSEE SOLUTIONS LLC
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-25-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-11-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: NONE GIVEN SERVED JUN-10-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOE'S CLOCK SHOP LLC
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,807.20 FILED BY JOE'S CLOCK SHOP LLC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHAMPSEE SOLUTIONS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAMPSEE SOLUTIONS LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOE'S CLOCK SHOP LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND CROSS-COMPLAINT DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS DEFENDANT DEMANDS ARBITRATION OF BOTH DISPUTES AS REQUIRED BY CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PARTIES", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT ON THE CROSS--COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MANISH CHAMPSEE--MANAGING MEMBER. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE REPRESENTED BY NICK A. OLIVERO--MANAGING MEMBER AND DAVID GLUCK--MANAGING MEMBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
